ingredients.name: Osaka University Toyonaka Campus
ingredients.localName: 大阪大学豊中キャンパス
ingredients.address: 1 Machikaneyamacho, Toyonaka, Osaka 560-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tsuneo attends Osaka University's Toyonaka Campus, and scenes of campus life here establish his world and ambitions, including his dream of studying marine biology abroad, the dream that will eventually create tension with his feelings for Josee.

ingredients.name: Osaka Waterfront Park “Sakuranomiya Beach”
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-5 Nakanocho, Miyakojima Ward, Osaka, 534-0027, Japan

ingredients.name: Sato Dental Clinic
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-24-9 Yamadahigashi, Suita, Osaka 565-0821, Japan

ingredients.name: Suma Beach
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-4 Sumauradori, Suma Ward, Kobe, Hyogo 654-0055, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Suma Beach is where Josee touches the ocean for the first time, a scene charged with joy and vulnerability as Tsuneo carries her to the water's edge. The wide sandy shore under the Kobe coastline backdrop is one of the film's most visually striking and emotionally resonant moments.

ingredients.name: Takoyaki-fu-fu Suma-ten
ingredients.localName: たこやき風風 須磨海浜水族園前店
ingredients.address: 2階, 5 Chome-1-2 Kinugakecho, Suma Ward, Kobe, Hyogo 654-0048, Japan

ingredients.name: Tengachaya SAKE HOUSE
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒557-0012 Osaka, Nishinari Ward, Shotenshita, 2 Chome−4−8

ingredients.localName: セブンイレブン 浪速日本橋西店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-2-19 Nipponbashinishi, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0004, Japan

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Tengachaya Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 天下茶屋駅前店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-18-21 Tengachaya, Nishinari Ward, Osaka, 557-0014, Japan

ingredients.name: Abeno Harukas
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-43 Abenosuji, Abeno Ward, Osaka, 545-6016, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The towering Abeno Harukas skyscraper in the Tennoji area appears as a landmark backdrop in city scenes, situating the story firmly in the Abeno-Tennoji district that serves as the geographic center of Josee's world.

ingredients.name: Alex Mansion
ingredients.localName: アレックスマンション
ingredients.address: Japan

ingredients.name: Aizenzaka
ingredients.address: 1 Yuhigaokacho, Tennoji Ward, Osaka, 543-0075, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Aizenzaka is a steep stone-paved slope in Tennoji that appears in the film as the kind of narrow hillside street Josee navigates by wheelchair, symbolizing both the literal and figurative obstacles she faces in moving through the city on her own terms.

ingredients.name: Namba Parks
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール
categories: ショッピング モール
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-10-70 Nanbanaka, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0011, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Namba Parks appears in urban Osaka scenes as a recognizable city landmark, part of the Namba area that features in the film's depiction of downtown Osaka where Tsuneo takes Josee out to experience the city.

ingredients.name: Nagisa Pharmacy Kinugake
ingredients.localName: なぎさ調剤薬局 衣掛店
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-2-31 Kinugakecho, Suma Ward, Kobe, Hyogo 654-0048, Japan

ingredients.name: Minoh City Central Library
ingredients.localName: 箕面市立 中央図書館
ingredients.address: 5 Chome-11-23 Minoo, Minoh, Osaka 562-0001, Japan

ingredients.name: Kobe Suma Seaworld
ingredients.localName: 神戸須磨シーワールド
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-3-5 Wakamiyacho, Suma Ward, Kobe, Hyogo 654-0049, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The aquarium near Suma Beach was the inspiration for the seaside aquatic setting Josee longs to visit, and the surrounding coastal area appears as the backdrop for the beach trip that marks a turning point in her relationship with Tsuneo.

ingredients.name: Kayashima Station
ingredients.address: 21 Kayashimahonmachi, Neyagawa, Osaka 572-0827, Japan

ingredients.name: Kawaguchiken Tea Stall
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-1-16 Uehonmachi, Tennoji Ward, Osaka, 543-0001, Japan

ingredients.name: Tennoji Zoo
ingredients.address: 1-108 Chausuyamacho, Tennoji Ward, Osaka, 543-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The zoo appears early in the film when Josee's grandmother used to take her as a child, and a visit here with Tsuneo rekindles those memories and shows how Josee begins to reclaim experiences she thought were out of reach.

ingredients.name: Tenshiba
ingredients.address: 5-55 Chausuyamacho, Tennoji Ward, Osaka, 543-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The open grass park in front of Tennoji appears as a gathering space where Josee and Tsuneo spend time together in the Tennoji district, the same neighborhood that forms the anchor of Josee's daily world throughout the film.

ingredients.name: Yodoyabashi Bridge
ingredients.address: Japan, Osaka, 1
ingredients.entityContext: Yodoyabashi Bridge over the Okawa river in central Osaka appears in the film's urban Osaka scenes, one of the classic riverside spots that give the film its sense of the city as a place both Tsuneo and Josee move through and gradually discover together.

ingredients.name: colombo cornershop
ingredients.address: 丸盛ビル 1F, 4 Chome-3-9 Minamikyuhojimachi, Chuo Ward, Osaka, 541-0058, Japan

ingredients.name: Iruri Osaka Shinsekai
ingredients.localName: いるり 大阪新世界店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-4-7 Ebisuhigashi, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0002, Japan

ingredients.name: Higashi-Hagoromo Station
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-18 Higashihagoromo, Takaishi, Osaka 592-0003, Japan

ingredients.name: Hep Five Ferris wheel
ingredients.address: HEP FIVE 7F, 5-15 Kakudacho, Kita Ward, Osaka, 530-0017, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The red Ferris wheel atop HEP FIVE in Umeda is where Josee and Tsuneo share a quiet, intimate ride above the Osaka skyline, one of the film's clearest signals that their relationship has deepened beyond caregiver and charge.

ingredients.name: Fukari Bridge
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-4 Minatomachi, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0017, Japan

ingredients.name: Doremi
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-18-8 Ebisuhigashi, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0002, Japan

ingredients.name: Diving Shop Ocean Stage Osaka Namba Shop
ingredients.localName: ダイビングショップ オーシャンステージ大阪
ingredients.type: ダイビング ショップ
categories: ダイビング ショップ
ingredients.address: なんばEKIKAN, 2 Chome-1-4 Shikitsuhigashi, Naniwa Ward, Osaka, 556-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A diving shop in the Namba area serves as the real-world reference for the dive shop where Tsuneo works part-time, the job that connects his passion for the ocean with his role as Josee's caregiver and his own dreams of studying abroad.

ingredients.name: Cartier Shinsaibashi Store
ingredients.localName: カルティエ心斎橋ブティック
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-1-3 Nishishinsaibashi, Chuo Ward, Osaka, 542-0086, Japan

ingredients.name: Capsule Hotel Asahi plaza Shinsaibasi
ingredients.localName: カプセルホテル朝日プラザ心斎橋
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-12-22 Nishishinsaibashi, Chuo Ward, Osaka, 542-0086, Japan

ingredients.name: CAFE BREAK Whity Umeda
ingredients.localName: カフェブレーク ホワイティ梅田店
ingredients.address: 梅田地下街 ５ー２, 2 Chome-16 Sonezaki, Kita Ward, Osaka, 530-0057, Japan

ingredients.name: Osaka Aquarium Kaiyukan
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-10 Kaigandori, Minato Ward, Osaka, 552-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This aquarium is where Josee experiences the ocean for the first time from inside the massive tank hall, gazing up at the whale shark in a scene that crystallizes her lifelong dream of seeing the sea. It is the emotional heart of the film, showing Josee's world expanding through Tsuneo's help.

ingredients.name: Ogishi Park
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-6 Shitaderamachi, Tennoji Ward, Osaka, 543-0076, Japan

ingredients.address: Otsuka, Takatsuki, Osaka 569-0000, Japan

ingredients.name: Tengachaya Station
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-1 Kishinosato, Nishinari Ward, Osaka, 557-0041, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tengachaya Station in Nishinari Ward is near Josee's home, and its surrounding streets in the Tengachaya district define the working-class Osaka neighborhood where she lives with her grandmother, grounding the film's setting in everyday south Osaka life.

ingredients.name: Triangle Park (Sankaku Park)
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-11-34 Nishishinsaibashi, Chuo Ward, Osaka, 542-0086, Japan
